input.command:
# Remove the standalone git repo we just created in D:\claude
rm -rf "D:/claude/.git"

# Copy D:\claude content into the .claude repo
cp -r "D:/claude/"* "C:/Users/Administrator/.claude/claude-output/"
ls "C:/Users/Administrator/.claude/claude-output/"
echo "==="

# Add, commit and push from the .claude repo
cd "C:/Users/Administrator/.claude" && git add claude-output/ && git status
